# Database connection example

```{python}
from database import (
    XlDatabase,
    Equipment,
    AnalysisType,
    AnalysisResult,
    expression
)
```

```{python}
db = XlDatabase()
list(db.GetAllEquipment())
```

```{python}
sem = Equipment(
    name         = "SEM",
    model        = "Model XYZ",
    manufacturer = "SEM Corp",
    serialNumber = "12345"
)

db.InsertEquipment(sem)
list(db.GetAllEquipment())
```

```{python}
items = list(
    db.Equipment.Query()
        .Where(expression("$.Name = 'SEM'"))
        .OrderBy(expression("$.Name"))
        .Limit(10)
        .ToList()
)

items[0].Id
```

```{python}
result = AnalysisResult(
    type      = AnalysisType.SEM,
    machineId = sem.Id,
    sampleId  = "Sample123",
    data      = "Analysis data goes here..."
)

db.InsertAnalysisResult(result)
list(db.GetAllAnalysisResults())
```
